pr.title: KoopCaps-HRM Ternary Reasoner — Koopman Capsule Dynamics + Adaptive Halting

output.summary: Ternary U-Net pairs Hadamard-rotated Koopman capsules, EngramHash feedback, and adaptive halting to pack structured reasoning into ~12MB via ternary packing.
techniques: Ternary U-Net with Hadamard-rotated Koopman capsules
Adaptive halting plus cross-window capsule carry
EngramHash and Hadamard-gated feedback for iterative refinement
